selections.name: Amazake
selections.reason: Resuming gelding from the Maher stable who brings vastly superior class lines to this Maiden. Ran in the G1 Victoria Derby and G3 Caulfield Classic last prep. Even if underdone, his raw ability should be too much for this field.

selections.name: Peeaitchdee
selections.reason: The fitness runner. Coming off a strong 2nd at Caulfield Heath over 7.5f. Will be right on the speed and hard to run down if the favorite is flat.

selections.name: Talkin' Stern
selections.reason: Showed improvement to run 2nd at this track and distance last start. Draws perfectly in barrier 2 to get a soft run.

selections.name: Washington Lilac
selections.reason: Consistent filly who has placed in 3 of 5 starts. Solid 4th at Caulfield Heath last time out.

danger_horse.name: Peeaitchdee
danger_horse.reason: Race fitness advantage over the top pick.

selections.name: Irreverent
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Just missed (2nd by a nose) at this track and distance last start. The form horse of the race.

selections.name: Costa Paros
selections.reason: Consistent performer with two 2nd place finishes in a row. Beaten 2.5L last start but is knocking on the door.

selections.name: On The Loose
selections.reason: Promising debut 3rd at this track. Will take natural improvement from that run and gets a good jockey booking.

selections.name: Zamparini Spirit
selections.reason: Has been competitive in metro maidens. 3rd at Sandown two starts back reads well for this.

danger_horse.name: Costa Paros
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form makes him a threat.

selections.name: Sweet Vixen
selections.reason: Excellent debut 2nd at Sale, beaten only 0.5L. The Alderson stable places them well, and natural improvement makes her the one to beat.

selections.name: She's Loaded
selections.reason: Consistent filly who has placed in 2 of 5 starts. Solid 3rd at Werribee last time. Experience counts here.

selections.name: Circus Circus
selections.reason: Resuming for the Begg stable. Showed ability in first prep with a 4th at Geelong. Watch betting.

selections.name: Kokeshi
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed some early speed in trials. Place chance in a field with many unknowns.

selections.name: Caffettiera
selections.reason: Massive class drop. Last raced in the G3 Blue Sapphire. Resuming here in a depleted field. Should be winning this on class alone.

selections.name: Innocent Enuff
selections.reason: Last start winner at Cranbourne. In form and fit, making her the logical danger if the top pick isn't ready.

selections.name: She's My Ex
selections.reason: Resuming. Won fresh last prep at Seymour. Has ability and goes well early in the campaign.

selections.name: Paradise Island
selections.reason: Struggling for form but in a 4-horse field, she fills the numbers.

selections.name: Midnight Glow
selections.reason: Significant class drop. Has been contesting Bm74, Bm78, and Quality races. Now drops to a standard Handicap. Even with top weight, his class edge is distinct.

selections.name: Madame Lexis
selections.reason: Won at this track and distance two starts back. Proven stayer who likes this circuit.

selections.name: Shrewsbury Road
selections.reason: Last start winner at Kilmore over 1.25m. Stays all day and is in winning form.

selections.name: Hollandia
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran 3rd at this track/distance last start. Always around the mark.

selections.name: Next Jen
selections.reason: Best Bet of the day. Last start 2nd in the Listed Desirable Stakes. Has G1/G2 form lines. Drops to a basic Handicap. Should blow these away.

selections.name: Heironaut
selections.reason: Won impressively on debut at Sale. Looks a progressive type who can measure up to this grade.

selections.name: Kakkoii
selections.reason: Resuming. Another one with Group form (G2 Vase). Classy runner who will be hitting the line hard.

selections.name: Grand Omaha
selections.reason: Resuming. Ran in the G3 Ethereal last prep. Has ability but might need the run.
